text: I’m a bit disappointed after trying it out. I had false expectations. I thought this would be a freely zoomable canvas, like Natto by <@U019PRL1BNU> but this is more like a scrollable grid view with a birds-eye-view mode. I think it has potential but none of the keyboard shortcuts work out of the box for me and there doesn’t seem to be support for common mouse wheel zoom interaction either :disappointed: This is a known issue on macOS: <https://github.com/utk-se/CodeRibbon/issues/89>

attachments.title: MacOS keybindings not working · Issue #89 · utk-se/CodeRibbon
attachments.text: Scroll ribbon left, scroll ribbon right, and toggle overview (possibly others) do not work on MacOS with a 2020 MBP. Using Atom&#39;s keybinding resolver, it appears that the third key is never ack...
attachments.fallback: GitHub: MacOS keybindings not working · Issue #89 · utk-se/CodeRibbon
